title: elaphoglossum sabineanum
intro: Elaphoglossum sabineanum, also known as Sabine's Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Elaphoglossum sabineanum can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and its extracts are also used in some herbal preparations.
